owner_authorization: The owner explicitly authorized B6.2 on 2026-07-24 to supersede only the L-2 falsification report-contract layer after Inspector finding P1. This authorization excludes any falsification-container inspection, market-return reading, execution, validation access, broker/provider activity, credential use, paid action, paper trade, and real-money action.
overlay_rule: Load and validate v2 and v3 independently; v3 overrides only the time-index contract and v2 remains the sole source of primary inference, DSR, MinTRL, trial inventory, and decision matrix.

report_contract.closed_world_rule: The validator enforces exact mode-specific field sets and rejects every additional field, including nested evidence objects.
report_contract.provenance_rule: contract_sha256 must equal this active contract's SHA-256, v2_sha256 and v3_sha256 must equal their locked sources, and producing_git_commit must equal the validating checkout HEAD.
report_contract.synthetic_rule: synthetic_fixture is no-data and can only be not_run.
report_contract.preflight_rule: A pre-data preflight failure can only be scope_restricted with no return-row parsing; it can never be falsified.
report_contract.execution_rule: falsified and not_falsified_not_validated require market-return execution plus the complete v2/v3 decision evidence, including container provenance/max_date, observations and independent-bet equivalents, paired active-return statistics, annual-to-daily conversion, PSR, DSR, complete five-trial inventory, costs/turnover, decision trace, timing attestation, and the validation seal.
report_contract.falsification_autopsy_rule: falsified additionally requires a mechanism autopsy covering horizon diversification, signal transform, lag, noise, and cost.

hard_stops: Any falsification-container inspection, market-return reading, backtest, or L-2 execution during B6.2.
Any B6.1 activation gate absent, invalid, or not separately owner-approved.
Any validation price, return, signal, position, regime, benchmark, or PnL observation.
Any in-place change to the B6 v1 artifact, validator, schema, runner, fixture, or locked manifest line.
Any broker/provider request, credential use, paid action, paper trade, or real-money action.
Any edge, E2, execution-quality, deployment, or real-money claim.
next_safe_action: After B6.2 is committed and independently accepted, request separate owner approval for B6.1 activation before any falsification-only container is inspected.
